product_identity.definition: 统一小教智能体根据工作状态，主导渐进式工作台，把教师的工作对象以动态工作面板呈现出来，并通过工作动作持续推进教师完成课前专业工作。

weekly_work_graph_relation.semester_weekly_calendar: progress supporting table; answers which week teaches what
weekly_work_graph_relation.weekly_work_graph: higher-level weekly work panel; organizes what to teach, prepare, evaluate, adjust, submit, handle, and carry over this week

purpose: Define Dynamic Work Panel as a renderer contract and state-derived view envelope, not a fixed card component.

visible_hidden_field_rules: visible fields must be teacher-actionable or reviewable
hidden fields may carry audit trace references and internal derivation state
missing information must stay explicit until resolved
provider prompts and raw responses must not be visible teacher content

layout_rules.primary: current work object and next safe action
layout_rules.assistant_surface: suggestion or confirmation only when useful

display_rules: derive panel display from Work State through Work View Composer
show status, gaps, linked artifacts, and available actions
avoid engineering terms in teacher-facing primary experience
preserve semester weekly calendar as supporting artifact when weekly work graph is visible

validation_focus: visible fields and actions are dynamic
chat history does not dominate default workspace
prohibited_patterns: put Jarvis into teacher-facing product copy
make Dynamic Work Panel a fixed dead card
split Xiaojiao into multiple business agents
let chat history dominate the workspace
replace semester weekly calendar with weekly work graph
let supporting tables replace the teaching work plan main document
hardcode art-teacher logic as a system-wide rule
turn sample room into classroom execution runtime
expose audit flags in teacher-facing primary copy
validation_requirements: checklist and result are valid JSON
ZIP paths are relative and clean
